name: Water Boatman
description: A docile aquatic bug from the koi pond that swims around the edges and shallow water. It is an easy, useful target, especially because killing it restores oxygen.
specialTraits: Killing it restores 60 seconds of oxygen, just like a diving bell spider.
behavior: It swims in random directions around the pond edges and shallow water. From time to time it rises to the surface, flips over, and refreshes the air bubble stored at the base of its body.
interactionWithPlayer: It never attacks and only flees when hit. Its real value is utility: killing one grants you extra oxygen during a dive.
interactionWithCreatures: It has no notable interactions with other creatures, and they rarely pay attention to it either. It simply exists as quiet pond fauna.
strategy: Hit it when it is still or moving slowly, ideally with a dagger or another water weapon. It is not dangerous, only slippery if you let it build distance.
